title: purosis #4451
definition:
1) a burning
    1a) the burning by which metals are roasted and reduced
    1b) by a figure drawn from a refiners fire
        1b1) calamities or trials that test the character
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a burning
    1a) the burning by which metals are roasted and reduced
    1b) by a figure drawn from a refiners fire
        1b1) calamities or trials that test the character

    NASB:  a burning, hence a refining:
